productOptionsHtml:
Use this section for ordering rules: style number, price band, minimums, and stated production time from the supplier catalog. Final invoice may reflect decoration, proofs, rush, or freight.

Style #PE41XL

Stated production time8 days

Quantity pricing (USD)

Price per unit at each order-quantity break (from the live product page).

QuantityPrice (each)
150$2.38 each
200$2.12 each
300$1.91 each

Catalog highlights

  • Performance Plastic golf tees are are engineered with a special low-resistant, four prong head.
  • The low-resistant head is built to create less friction between the tee and the golf ball during impact resulting in longer drives.
  • Made with top-grade ABS material that provides unmatched durability.

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

Shank of Tees & Front of Ball Markers ▼

Price Includes: 1 Color/1 Location Imprint on Tees & Markers

DI-PE41XL-SHANK OF TEES & FRONT OF BALL MARKERS

PMS Numbers Required ▼

PMS Color Match Charge For Non-Standard Colors

DI-PE41XL-PMS NUMBERS REQUIRED

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — 4 Performance Tees 3 1/4", 1 Ball Marker. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style PE41XL on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 8 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 150 units (per catalog line).
